chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2032 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 7536/24 3.For hearing of main case 07-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** On 03.04.2025, the following order was passed: “None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. This Constitutional Petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, matter is adjourned to 07.05.2025. Issue intimation notice to Counsel for the Petitioner”. Today, none appeared on behalf of the petitioner; no intimation is received, which reflects that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
